fixes_applied: Removed extra contact/source CTA grid and focused contact right card on private parties
Swapped private-party teaser image away from awkward exterior/logo crop
caveats: Owner must verify preferred domain, exact current hours, and any changed menu prices before final delivery
Confirm phone/address/directions on a real device before final packaging
If apparent post-footer dark space appears in manual mobile browser, trim before delivery

mission_control_remote_sync.blocker: AGENCY_AUTONOMY_API_KEY and OPENCLAW_WEBHOOK_SECRET are unset in this runtime, so this payload is local-only until official Mission Control API auth is available. No raw Supabase write was used.

heartbeat_summary: Completed Ciao Baby QA round 2 locally. Visual/sellability QA found internal-sounding labels and contact clutter; fixes were applied, typecheck/build passed, four routes recaptured with zero overflow, and QA2 now passes with owner-verification caveats.
